response.global_summary: A concert performance featuring two songs by VTubers Tokoyami Towa and Amane Kanata. The video includes a performance of '螺旋結び' (Rasen Musubi) followed by '花になって' (Hana ni Natte).

scenes.description: Tokoyami Towa and Amane Kanata perform '螺旋結び'. They are singing and dancing on a stage with a large screen in the background.
A short transition period between songs.
Tokoyami Towa and Amane Kanata perform '花になって' by Ryokuoushoku Shakai. Lyrics and composer credits are visible on screen.
